/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AlianWorlds.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AlianWorlds.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o AlianWorlds  /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so libimgui_lib.a libimgui_lib.a /usr/lib64/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
